FABER/Hip pathology, sacroiliac joint pathology, iliopsoas tightness
Ober's Test/Tight IT band or tight TFL
Thomas' Test/Rectus femoris tightness or iliopsoas tightness
AC Compression Test/Acriomioclavicular separation or ligament sprain and/or coracoclavicular sprain
AC Distraction Test/Compromise of acromioclavicular ligament
Empty Can Test/Weakness or tear of supraspinatus
Hawkins Kennedy Test/Shoulder impingement of supraspinatus or long head of biceps brachii
Neer's Test/Shoulder impingement of supraspinatus and long head of biceps tendon
Piano Key Sign/Instability of AC joint
Yergason's Test/Bicipital tendinitis or tear or laxity of transverse humeral ligament
Push Off Test/Subscapularis rupture or dysfunction
Hornblower's Test/Strength and integrity of teres minor
